title: Translation Surfaces
description: Four independent studies of translated text embedded into different designed objects: wayfinding, packaging, transit safety, and app onboarding.
creative_direction: Independent localization surfaces that do not share references. Each image stresses a different typography constraint: signage grids, label microcopy, pictogram alignment, and mobile interface cards.

en.title: Translation Surfaces
en.description: Four independent studies of translated text embedded into different designed objects.

zh-CN.title: 翻译表面单图
zh-CN.description: 四张独立单图，测试导视、包装、交通安全和移动界面里的图内翻译。
